# Bounds methods <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

## Means bounds and SD bounds

- TIDES + power + false positives
- Plausibility as well as possibility

## CI bounds vs. estimates

- Estimate in CIs
- Harder test: estimate in middle of CIs. Bounds of the mean given the CIs, i.e., is it in the bounds that define the middle given rounding

## Mean inside range

- Is the reported mean inside the possible range of the measure?

## Metric bounds

- E.g., correlations must be in [-1, 1]

## Correlation matrix positive definiteness

- Checking whether reported correlation tables are positive definite
